idea-plugin.change-notes: update gradle libraries auto written to build.gradle enhance indentation position in Activity.kt
idea-plugin.name: Kotlin Android S.O.L.I.D Arch
idea-plugin.description:
Android Kotlin Clean Architecture generator.

We generate minimum setup helper of ViewModel, UseCase, and Repository automatically with additional support for Retrofit and Coroutine setup.

To use this tool feature, select View > Tool Windows > Generate S.O.L.I.D Architecture.

📸 Screenshots and usage guide:

https://github.com/mikkelofficial7/android-clean-arch-plugin


▶️ Watch this video to learn more:

https://videy.co/v?id=Jkf9Uo482
